# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        skipDefaultCheckout()
        timestamps()
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', description: 'Docker image tag')
        string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', description: 'Docker registry URL')
    }

    environment {
        DOCKER_REGISTRY = REGISTRY_URL
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                sh "docker build -t ${IMAGE_TAG} ."
            }
        }
        stage('Push Docker Image to Registry') {
            steps {
                withDockerRegistry([credentialsId: 'registry-creds', url: DOCKER_REGISTRY]) {
                    sh "docker tag ${IMAGE_TAG} ${DOCKER_REGISTRY}/${IMAGE_TAG}"
                    sh "docker push ${DOCKER_REGISTRY}/${IMAGE_TAG}"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        cleanup()
    }
}
